calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Payment Rights_1062461-01
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No other appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER ACCESS FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is taken Off Calendar. Order granted May 15, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

Approval Of A Transfer Of Certain Rights To Future Payments Under A Structured Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar May-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT GRANTHAM OF HOFFMAN & GRANTHAM, TEL. NO. (626) 765-6937, PETITIONER APPEARING BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
DONALD PIPKINS, TEL. NO. 821-6339 ALSO APPEARING IN COURT.

RULING - Approval Of A Transfer Of Certain Rights To Future Payments Under A Structured Settlement Agreement is granted after the court inquired whether Mr. Pipkins understand that he would not be getting the best deal. Mr. Pipkins fully understand and this was his decision. Moving party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185 =(302/HK)

Approval Of A Transfer Of Certain Rights To Future Payments Under A Structured Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Continued To May-08-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. LEA I. HOFFMAN OF THE HOFFMAN & GRANTHAM LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (626)765-6937 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
DONALD PIPKINS, TEL. N0. 521-6239, PETITIONER ALSO APPEARING IN COURT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED REGARDING THE TIMELINESS OF THE PETITION BEING HEARD TODAY WHICH WAS SET THROUGH AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: Petition for Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is continued to May 8, 2015 to give notice to all interested parties per Insurance Code Section 10134 through 10139.5. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/ehg
